CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: validate-review-output.sh, merge-to-main.sh, validate.sh) ✓

Key findings:
- validate-review-output.sh: max depth 7 at lines 410, 423 (Python code inside shell heredoc, with 28-space indent from else→for→if→if nesting)
- merge-to-main.sh: max depth 6 at line 579 (already at limit, no changes needed)
- validate.sh: max depth 6 at line 1126 (already at limit, no changes needed)

Only validate-review-output.sh needs changes. The fix is to extract Python helper functions or use guard clauses to flatten the dims validation block.
